creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Tamas Szakaly from comment #2)
Thanks but this really should have been a unified diff instead of a shar.
Especially since some patches have been deleted which is not particularly
clear after unpacking the shar.  :-(

Please submit a unified diff for port updates next time.

devel/gradle is now at 6.0.1 and it does not build with that version either,
so I will leave the build dep at Gradle 5.0 for now which seems to be working
fine.

Anyway, committed the update. Thanks!
